name: codex
description: Bring OpenClaw sessions and Gateway-backed chat into Codex.

interface.shortDescription: OpenClaw sessions and chat inside Codex
interface.longDescription: Browse, create, monitor, and talk to OpenClaw sessions without leaving Codex. Newer Codex hosts place sessions directly in the sidebar; the same app includes a master-detail session rail for older hosts.
defaultPrompt: Continue my most recent OpenClaw session
